properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine agrees on plan to acquire 16 Rafale jets, France’s Macron says

properties.descricao: Donald Trump backs away from fee, says regional countries will instead invest in US in return for transit protection.

properties.descricao: Inflation eased due to cheaper energy, but experts warn price increases may return after renewed US-Iran tensions.

properties.descricao: Investigators are looking into what motivated the killing and how much preparation was involved.

properties.descricao: The Iran-backed Houthis blame Saudi Arabia for the attack in Yemen's capital and say they targeted Abha airport in response.

properties.titulo_evento: Iranian newspaper threatens Germany's Chancellor Merz

properties.titulo_evento: US-Iraq relations: Can Iran-allied militias be disarmed?
properties.descricao: When Donald Trump meets Iraq's new PM today, they are likely to discuss disarming Iran's allies in Iraq. Some have already pledged to give up their guns. But is that likely? And will it influence the US-Iran war?

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: Strait of Hormuz tanker strikes raise tensions
properties.descricao: The UAE has threatened to retaliate after Iranian strikes on two of its oil tankers. Iran has carried out numerous strikes on US allies in response to overnight US attacks. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: As the world rearms, South Korea aims to cash in
properties.descricao: Weapons and military equipment produced in South Korea are sought-after due to their reliability, speedy delivery times and relatively low prices. Global demand for weapons has surged after Russia's invasion of Ukraine.

properties.titulo_evento: Nigeria offers clues to new US Africa strategy
properties.descricao: The withdrawal of US troops from Nigeria after the killing of an "Islamic State" leader may be less about leaving Africa than redefining how Washington fights terrorism on the continent.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine targets another 11 Russian ships in Sea of Azov
properties.descricao: Ukraine said it struck tankers and cargo vessels in the Sea of Azov, in the latest strikes on Russian commercial shipping. Moscow's Agriculture Ministry said "alternative shipping routes" are being sought.

properties.titulo_evento: Bastille Day: France holds parade with Ukraine in focus
properties.descricao: The celebrations featured troops and warplanes from around Europe in a show of support for Ukraine, as it fends off Russia's ongoing invasion. It was Emmanuel Macron's last Bastille Day as France's president.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Military conscientious objections spike
properties.descricao: The number of people applying for conscientious objection to military service has risen sharply and there were around 5,100 heat-related deaths recorded in June alone. DW has more.

properties.descricao: For decades, OPEC influenced the market by how much oil it produced. But China, the largest importer, is demonstrating its remarkable power over prices.
